features.heading: What does PROJEIC offer?
features.subheading: Tools designed for the rhythms and needs of the EIC community
features.kanbanDesc: Organize tasks in configurable columns with automatic activity logging.
features.healthDesc: Green/yellow/red traffic light calculated from activity and overdue tasks.
features.publicDesc: Shareable URL per project, visible without login to the university community.
features.rolesDesc: Administrator, Supervisor, Student, and External with differentiated permissions.

publicFooter.description: Management and traceability of academic projects for engineering.

aboutPage.heroSubtitle: Transparency and traceability for academic projects.
aboutPage.aboutDescription: PROJEIC is an academic project management platform developed for the Coquimbo School of Engineering of the Universidad Católica del Norte. Its main objective is to centralize tracking, provide public visibility, and ensure full traceability of the student project lifecycle, connecting students, supervising professors, and the university community in a single collaborative environment.
aboutPage.transparencyDesc: Generation of a public or semi-public portfolio where the community can view the initiatives created in the School.
aboutPage.traceabilityDesc: Complete history of the activity, tasks, and decisions made during the semester by the project members.
aboutPage.collaborationDesc: Differentiated roles and unified tools that allow multidisciplinary teams to operate with greater synergy.

eicPage.aboutDescription: The Coquimbo School of Engineering (EIC) is the academic unit of the Universidad Católica del Norte, Coquimbo campus, responsible for designing, coordinating and developing teaching, research and outreach in the field of engineering sciences. We train well-rounded professionals with a solid scientific and technological foundation, capable of solving complex problems with an ethical and sustainable perspective.
eicPage.careerCS: Civil Engineering in Computing and Informatics

loginPage.heading: Structured management for your projects
loginPage.subheading: Centralize information, collaborate with your team and keep control of every stage of development.
